articles.headline: Susana Mendoza enters the race for Chicago mayor
articles.summary: The state comptroller joined the mayoral field on June 3, sharpening debates over crime, taxes and city finances.

articles.headline: Bears announce plan to move to Hammond, Indiana
articles.summary: The Chicago Bears unveiled plans to relocate across the state line to Hammond, Indiana, stirring civic and economic debate.

articles.headline: CPD consent decree back in focus as oversight reports land
articles.summary: Since 2019 the Chicago Police Department has operated under a federal consent decree; new compliance scrutiny renews the public-safety debate.

articles.headline: Storm cleanup underway as thousands remain without power
articles.summary: Severe storms knocked out power to thousands across the Chicago area; cleanup and restoration are ongoing.
